benefits.description: Increase in libido and possibly testosterone elevation
Telomere lengthening potential (primary stated reason for use)

protocol_notes: Khavinson protocol: 10mg subcutaneous 3 times per week for 3 weeks. User has history of low testosterone post-COVID and had previously refused exogenous testosterone and enclomiphene due to side effects. Plans to repeat protocol every 6 months. User notes libido/testosterone response may be more common than literature suggests, particularly in hypogonadal individuals.
